question_text: Which of the following is the best example of how the body uses chemical energy from food?

options.label: A
options.text: To create light in the eyes

options.label: B
options.text: To power muscle contractions and maintain body temperature

options.label: D
options.text: To produce electrical signals in the air around the body

explanation: The chemical energy in food is converted to kinetic energy for movement and thermal energy for maintaining body temperature. These are the main uses of food energy.
